subjects.description: golden retriever wearing futuristic virtual reality goggles
subjects.appearance_details: friendly golden retriever with sleek reflective VR goggles, warm fur detail, relaxed seated posture, and curious head movement
subjects.relationship: central dog subject immersed in a virtual reality experience
subjects.location: center of a cozy backyard on a lush green lawn
subjects.relative_size: medium dog scale, central focus against the wider backyard
subjects.orientation: facing slightly toward camera with head turning as if following unseen virtual motion
subjects.pose: sitting comfortably with paws planted and head lifted
subjects.action: reacts gently to the VR experience while the camera widens around the backyard
subjects.state_changes: head tilts, ears perk, goggles reflect sunset color, fur glows warmer as the camera pulls back
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: golden fur with detailed strands, sunset highlights, and soft realistic texture
subjects.facial_features: dark nose, floppy ears, relaxed mouth, eyes hidden behind glossy VR lenses

background_setting: Cozy backyard with lush green lawn, warm sunset sky blending orange and pink, soft garden edges, and an open space that becomes more visible as the perspective widens.

lighting.conditions: Golden sunset light casts warm highlights over the lawn, fur, and reflective VR goggles.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Golden sunset light casts warm highlights over the lawn, fur, and reflective VR goggles.

aesthetics.composition: Warm backyard futurism, friendly dog portrait, soft sunset colors, crisp fur texture, and playful high-tech detail.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Warm backyard futurism, friendly dog portrait, soft sunset colors, crisp fur texture, and playful high-tech detail.

cinematography.camera_motion: Starts as a medium dog portrait and gradually widens into a panoramic backyard view with the dog centered.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Charming near-future pet realism with cinematic sunset warmth and crisp material detail.
context: A golden retriever sits in a cozy backyard at sunset, wearing futuristic VR goggles and appearing fully immersed in the experience.

actions.description: The golden retriever sits on the backyard lawn, VR goggles reflecting orange and pink sunset light.
The dog tilts its head and perks its ears as if tracking something inside the virtual world.
The camera widens to a panoramic view of the backyard with the dog still centered and absorbed.

segments.description: Introduce the dog and its sleek VR goggles in warm sunset light.
segments.key_changes: Goggles catch colored reflections, fur glows gold, lawn texture is crisp.
segments.camera: Medium portrait shot at dog height.

segments.description: Show the dog reacting to the unseen virtual experience.
segments.key_changes: Head tilts, ears perk, reflections shift across the goggles.
segments.camera: Gentle close tracking around the face.

segments.description: Reveal the wider cozy backyard as sunset color fills the frame.
segments.key_changes: Perspective widens, lawn and sky expand, the dog remains centered and still engaged.
segments.camera: Slow pullback to a panoramic wide shot.

temporal_caption: A golden retriever wearing sleek VR goggles sits in a sunset backyard, tilts its head, and remains immersed as the view widens.
audio_description: Soft backyard ambience, light evening breeze, distant birds, faint dog breathing, and a quiet electronic hum from the goggles.
